title: TV channel for dogs
transcript:
Forget playing fetch. These dogs would rather watch TV.
And the shows were made just for them.
Believe it or not, there's a popular streaming network called, what else, Dog TV.
What is Dog TV?
Dog TV is a TV channel for dogs to watch.
So you leave it on for your dog when you're not at home.
And he feels a little more comfortable, more stress-free, more relaxed, and more happy when he's there.
It's like a babysitter for your dog.
Dog TV starts here in a studio warehouse in Newark, New Jersey, but...
it's available in 150 countries all around the world and...
while it might not look like much right now with me and my friend Buddy here,
By the time it makes it to your TV screen, it looks more like this.
So what are the most popular shows for pooches?
Dogs with babies is a hit.
So is playing in the great outdoors.
And canines simply taking a snooze.
Dog TV helps one year old Trixie, a Shih Tzu Poodle mix, with her separation anxiety when her owners go out.
We actually spy on her with our dog camera
and we know that she's watching it.
We arranged a doggy watch party.
Gage, the German Shepherd, perks his ears when dog toys appear on the screen.
TV is definitely going... to the dogs.
